utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all these 7 items. Each of them is fully specified with details: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clearly chosen; travel_dates (2024-06-01 to 2024-06-05) are specific; transportation includes flight details with costs and conditions; accommodation includes hotel name, type, location, amenities, cost, and refundability; activities include types, operator, dates, cost, and refundability; additional_services include dining details with costs; total_budget includes total cost, currency, cancellation policy, and eco rating. All required details are filled out and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package chosen by the AI includes the destination Lisbon, Portugal; transportation via standard carrier in Economy class; accommodation at Family Haven Hotel; activities described as Walking tours, Golf sessions, and Culinary experiences; and dining at Fine Dining Experience. From the ground-truth data: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 8. For transportation, a standard airline Economy class has a rating of 5. The Family Haven Hotel has a rating of 8. Among activities, Golf Day corresponds to 'Golf sessions' with a rating of 10, City Walking Tour corresponds to 'Walking tours' with a rating of 8, and Fine Dining Experience (which fits 'Culinary experiences') has a rating of 10. The dining choice 'Fine Dining Experience' also has a rating of 10 under restaurants. Therefore, the mapped ratings are as follows.
